title: Implement Stage 8 CityGML LOD2+3 export
description: Create scripts/export/export_citygml.py to convert building params + meshes to CityGML LOD2 (extruded footprints) and LOD3 (detailed facades). Use cjio library. Output to citygml/. Must handle SRID 2952 coordinate system and include HCD metadata as generic attributes.
